insight: the protocol effect replicates on a disjoint django sample (5/7, matching iter146's 5/7) and pools to 10/13 = 0.769 real completion (baseline 0) across django 11xxx-15xxx - so the intervention rate is robust, not a small-N artifact of the original instances
